features.title: Multi-tenant fair scheduling
features.description: Add global tenant round-robin to send_queue.lease_batch so no single tenant starves others in a shared pool. Includes tenant_user_id on every queue row, per-tenant daily cap enforcement in throttle_service, and a pre-send campaign-status sync-check in the sender agent. Replaces the single-tenant lease pattern that currently sorts only by scheduled_for.

features.title: Container self-configuration by size
features.description: Containers read CPU_VCPU and RAM_MB env vars at boot and auto-configure sender_agents and extraction_agents from a shared allocation formula. Reports the chosen allocation to CRM in the register and heartbeat payloads so the admin dashboard can show exactly what each container is doing. Enables mixed-size fleets and 1 CPU / 1GB defaults.

features.title: Active-work polling + tenant quotas
features.description: Replace the single-tenant /api/mcp/campaigns?since poll with a tenant-aware /api/mcp/active-work?since that returns all running campaigns across tenants the pool serves. Add /api/mcp/tenant-quotas polled every 15 minutes for per-tenant daily caps and plan-tier limits. Drops the legacy pool_id parameter.

features.title: Rich heartbeat for fleet observability
features.description: Extend heartbeat payload so mcp_worker_instances in the CRM reflects true container state: size (cpu/ram), started_at, uptime, sender/extraction agent counts active, per-tenant backlog counters, extraction_queue_depth, and current campaigns-in-flight list. Powers the Container Fleet Dashboard's live panel.

features.title: Mongo shard-key predeclaration and streaming ingest
features.description: Add shard_key = sha256(tenant_user_id)[:16] to every multi-tenant collection write (send_queue, campaign_contacts, refined_contacts, campaign_stats). Include shard_key prefix in compound indexes. Switch JSON file parsing to ijson streaming so 500MB files do not OOM a small container. Future-proofs Year-2+ sharding with zero backfill.
